metadata.title: Worker profile | Slashie
metadata.description: View a Slashie worker profile, skills, reviews, service area, and contact actions.

en.notFoundDescription: This worker profile may be unavailable or no longer active.
en.addBioDescription: Customers read this before accepting your quote. Two or three sentences about the work you do best.
en.addSkillsDescription: Skills become searchable tags, so customers find you for the right tasks.
en.addPhotosDescription: Workers with photos win more quotes. Add pictures of finished jobs.

metadata.title: Worker 個人檔案 | Slashie
metadata.description: 查看 Slashie worker 個人檔案、技能、評價、服務地區和聯絡操作。

zh_hk.loading: 正在載入 worker 個人檔案...
zh_hk.notFoundDescription: 此 worker 個人檔案可能無法使用或已不再啟用。
zh_hk.addBioDescription: Customers 接受你的報價前會閱讀這段內容。用兩三句說明你最擅長的工作。
zh_hk.addSkillsDescription: 技能會成為可搜尋標籤，幫助 customers 找到適合任務的你。
zh_hk.addPhotosDescription: 有相片的 workers 較容易贏得報價。加入已完成工作的相片。
